name: jobhunting
description: 一个Chrome浏览器插件，可以自动读取网页表单并填写本地CSV数据库中的信息。

scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p lib/flatpickr/l10n && cp node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.js node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.css lib/flatpickr/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp node_modules/flatpickr/dist/l10n/zh.js lib/flatpickr/l10n/ 2>/dev/null || true
